scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npx wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm run start"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npx vite build && cd ../server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx tsc
scripts.build:desktop: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm install && npm run build
scripts.pack:desktop: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm install && npm run pack
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
